forms.customHeadContent:
<style>
.hierarchical-dropdown {
  position: relative;
  font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
  font-size: 14px;
  z-index: 1000;
}

.hierarchical-dropdown.always-visible {
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: white;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  min-width: 250px;
  max-width: 400px;
}

.dropdown-status {
  padding: 8px 12px;
  background: #f8f9fa;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e9ecef;
  border-radius: 6px 6px 0 0;
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #6c757d;
  text-align: center;
}

.hierarchical-dropdown.field-targeted .dropdown-status {
  background: #d4edda;
  color: #155724;
  border-bottom-color: #c3e6cb;
}

.dropdown-main-menu {
  background: white;
  min-width: 150px;
  max-height: 300px;
  overflow-y: auto;
}

.dropdown-flyout {
  position: absolute;
  background: white;
  border: 1px solid #ccc;
  border-radius: 4px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
  /*min-width: 200px;*/
  min-width: 400px;
  max-height: 400px;
  overflow-y: auto;
  z-index: 1001;
}

.dropdown-item {
  padding: 8px 12px;
  cursor: pointer;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  line-height: 1.4;
  color: #333; /* Ensure text is visible */
  background-color: white; /* Ensure background is set */
  min-height: 32px; /* Ensure items have height */
}

.dropdown-item:last-child {
  border-bottom: none;
}

.dropdown-item:hover:not(.disabled):not(.section-title) {
  background-color: #f5f5f5;
}

.dropdown-item.main-item {
  background-color: #fafafa;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.dropdown-item.main-item:hover {
  background-color: #e8e8e8;
}

.dropdown-item.main-item .arrow {
  color: #666;
  font-size: 12px;
}

.dropdown-item.selectable-item {
  background-color: white;
  font-weight: normal;
}

.dropdown-item.selectable-item:hover {
  background-color: #e8f4fd;
  color: #0066cc;
}

.dropdown-item.disabled {
  color: #999;
  cursor: not-allowed;
  font-style: italic;
}

.dropdown-item.section-title {
  background-color: #f8f9fa;
  color: #495057;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 12px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  cursor: default;
  padding: 6px 12px;
}

.dropdown-separator {
  height: 1px;
  background-color: #e0e0e0;
  margin: 4px 0;
}

/* Styling for different item types */
.dropdown-item.date-format-item {
  font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
  font-size: 13px;
}

/* Scrollbar styling for webkit browsers */
.dropdown-main-menu::-webkit-scrollbar,
.dropdown-flyout::-webkit-scrollbar {
  width: 6px;
}

.dropdown-main-menu::-webkit-scrollbar-track,
.dropdown-flyout::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
  background: #f1f1f1;
  border-radius: 3px;
}

.dropdown-main-menu::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb,
.dropdown-flyout::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  background: #c1c1c1;
  border-radius: 3px;
}

.dropdown-main-menu::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover,
.dropdown-flyout::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
  background: #a8a8a8;
}

/* Animation for smooth transitions - only for flyouts, not always-visible main menu */
.dropdown-flyout {
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(-10px);
  transition: opacity 0.15s ease, transform 0.15s ease;
}

.dropdown-flyout[style*="block"] {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0);
}

/* Responsive adjustments */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .dropdown-main-menu,
  .dropdown-flyout {
    min-width: 120px;
    font-size: 13px;
  }
  
  .dropdown-item {
    padding: 10px 12px;
  }
}
</style>

forms.description: This form allows an administrator to update the notification preferences of a user or team.
forms.name: Notification Preferences

events.name: Set Drop Down Options
Trigger Clear Fields
events.code: K('button[Clear]').trigger('click');

renderAttributes.Placeholder: Enter a few characters of the team name and press enter
Enter a few characters of the user's Username, Display Name, or Email and press enter

mappings.value: ${integration('Notification Delivery Target') !== values('Email') && (integration('Notification Delivery Method') === "Email" || integration('Notification Delivery Target') === "Slack") ? ["Email is Different"] : []}

events.name: Clear Errors
Clear Notification Delivery Target and Notification Email is Different

elements.name: Slack Channel
elements.visible: values('Team or User') === "Team" && values('Notification Delivery Method') === "Slack"
elements.label: Slack Channel
elements.required: values('Team or User') === "Team" && values('Notification Delivery Method') === "Slack"

elements.name: Notification Email is Different
elements.visible: values('Team or User') === "User" && (values('Notification Delivery Method') === "Email" || values('Notification Delivery Method') === "Slack")

choices.label: Notification email is different from the user's profile email

elements.name: Notification Delivery Target
elements.visible: values('Notification Delivery Method') === "Group Email" || (values('Notification Email is Different').includes('Email is Different') && (values('Notification Delivery Method') === "Email" || values('Notification Delivery Method') == "Slack"))
elements.label: Notification Delivery Target

constraints.content: values('Notification Delivery Target') !== null && values('Email') !== values('Notification Delivery Target')
constraints.message: Only populate the Notification Delivery Target email if it is different from the user's profile email

elements.required: values('Notification Delivery Method') === "Group Email" || values('Notification Email is Different').includes('Email is Different')

events.name: Set Content Element
events.code: $(K('content[Message]').element()).html(K('field[Message]').value());

events.runIf: values('Team or User') === "Team" && values('Team Slug') !== null && Object.keys(K('form').validate()).length === 0
events.name: Apply Changes - Team

events.runIf: values('Team or User') === "User" && values('Username') !== null && Object.keys(K('form').validate()).length === 0
events.name: Apply Changes - User

events.code: K('form').submitPage();

events.runIf: values('Team or User') === "Team" && values('Team Slug') === null
events.name: Team Search - Set Fields

mappings.value: ${(integration('Notification Delivery Target') && integration('Notification Delivery Target') !== values('Email') && (integration('Notification Delivery Method') === "Email" || integration('Notification Delivery Method') === "Slack")) ? '["Email is Different"]' : '[]'}

events.name: Add Carriage Return Listeners

elements.defaultValue: ${(identity('profileAttribute:Notification Delivery Target') && identity('profileAttribute:Notification Delivery Target') !== identity('email') && (identity('profileAttribute:Notification Delivery Method') === "Email" || identity('profileAttribute:Notification Delivery Method') === "Slack")) ? '["Email is Different"]' : '[]'}
elements.visible: values('Notification Delivery Method') === "Email" || values('Notification Delivery Method') === "Slack"

choices.label: Notification email is different from my profile email

elements.name: Notification Delivery Target
elements.visible: values('Notification Email is Different').includes('Email is Different') && (values('Notification Delivery Method') === "Email" || values('Notification Delivery Method') == "Slack")
elements.label: Notification Delivery Target

constraints.content: values('Notification Delivery Target') !== null && identity('email') !== values('Notification Delivery Target')
constraints.message: Only populate the Notification Delivery Target if it is different from your profile email.

elements.required: values('Notification Email is Different').includes('Email is Different')

forms.description: Store of date formats for Notifications
forms.name: Notification Template Dates

elements.name: Name Explanation
elements.text: The Name of the date format is the name you will be including in your message templates inside the ${"${format('DateName')}"} tag. It should likely be something human readable and short but descriptive, like ShortDatewithTime.

elements.name: Format Explanation
elements.text: The date format should be a ruby date format such as %m-%e-%y %H:%M for 03-17-16 15:19. Examples and explanation can be found at http://www.foragoodstrftime.com/
